calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Verleana Green, via ZOOM, for Sherry Jackson, via ZOOM, Administrator.

Ms. Green reports that she has not heard from the Franchise Tax Board and confirms that Jamesa Brown's assignment to Inheritance Funding is $7000. Ms. Green confirms the filing of supplemental declarations to address the preceding.

The Petition for Final Distribution is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
